context.projectOverview: Sprint 2 retry. Iteration 1 passed S2-C1..C5 but FAILED S2-C6 (hint).

completedSprints.title: materializeContracts helper
completedSprints.summary: helper + deterministic ids; pipeline delegates. Commit 1a7cd2b.

evaluatorFeedback: Iteration 1 FAILED on S2-C6 only (5/6 passed; S2-C1..C5 are GREEN and committed in 36de025 — do NOT redo or regress them). Root cause: the next-step hint at plan.ts:178 (runPlanCommand, non-clarification branch) was changed to 'npx agent-bober run', but `run` re-plans from scratch (calls runPlanner internally) and IGNORES the contracts that plan just materialized. The command that executes the just-created plan is `npx agent-bober sprint` (it loadLatestSpec + listContracts). REQUIRED FIXES: (1) plan.ts runPlanCommand non-clarification hint -> point to `npx agent-bober sprint` to execute the plan. (2) The S2-C6 criterion requires the hint be CONSISTENT with plan answer's hint. So plan answer (runPlanAnswerCommand, currently plan.ts:~297) must ALSO say `sprint`. For that to be CORRECT (sprint must succeed there), plan answer must MATERIALIZE contracts when it resolves the spec to status 'ready'. runPlanAnswerCommand currently does NOT load config — add loadConfig(projectRoot), and when remaining open clarifications == 0 AND updated.status === 'ready', call clearContractsForSpec(projectRoot, updated.specId) then materializeContracts(updated, projectRoot, config), then print the `sprint` hint. Apply the same materialize-on-ready behavior to runPlanAnswerInteractive (it also flips to ready). Guard with try/catch so a materialization error logs but does not crash the answer command. (3) Update the S2-C6 test to assert the printed output contains 'agent-bober sprint' (not 'agent-bober run'); add a test that resolving the final clarification through runPlanAnswerCommand materializes schema-valid contracts and prints the sprint hint. Keep S2-C1..C5 and all S1 tests green. The 6 cockpit-integration E2E failures are pre-existing/unrelated — ignore them.
instructionsPointer: Read the contract at .bober/contracts/sprint-spec-20260623-plan-contracts-materialization-2.json and the briefing at .bober/briefings/sprint-spec-20260623-plan-contracts-materialization-2-briefing.md.
